name: @metorial/front
description: Manage Front shared inboxes and team-based communication across email, SMS, chat, and social media. List, read, reply to, and manage conversations including assignment, status, tags, followers, links, reminders, custom fields, and inbox moves. Send messages through Front channels, manage contacts and duplicate merges, manage accounts, tags, links, inboxes, channels, teams, teammates, message templates, analytics reports and exports, knowledge base content, and webhook events.
